site.title: i18n Learning Project
site.description: A demo project for learning Next.js internationalization

hero.title: Master Next.js Internationalization
hero.subtitle: From beginner to expert, learn i18n best practices
hero.description: This project demonstrates how to implement complete multilingual support in Next.js App Router, covering routing, translation, formatting, and SEO.

features.title: Core Feature Demos
features.subtitle: Each page showcases different internationalization techniques

routing.title: Smart Routing
routing.description: URL prefix-based multilingual routing with automatic language detection and preference memory

translation.title: Flexible Translation
translation.description: Support for ICU message syntax, variable interpolation, plural rules, and rich text translation

formatting.title: Localized Formatting
formatting.description: Automatic localization for dates, times, numbers, and currency display

seo.title: Multilingual SEO
seo.description: Auto-generated alternate language links, metadata translation, and Open Graph tags

icu_demo.title: ICU Message Syntax Demo
icu_demo.items: You have {count, plural, =0 {no messages} =1 {one message} other {# messages}}.
